description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the rubdos/python3-clang Docker image. Define three stages: build, test, and deploy, and include a before_script that runs pip3 install -r requirements.txt before every job. In the build stage add a build job that executes which nosetests then python3 setup.py install --user. In the test stage add a static-analysis job that runs coala-ci and a unit-tests job that runs nosetests. In the deploy stage add a deploy job that runs only on the master branch and runs bash push_pypi.sh to publish the package to PyPI.
